sentence: 这本书是他们两人合著的。
pinyin: Zhè běn shū shì tāmen liǎng rén hézhù de.
english: This book was co-authored by the two of them.

sentence: 这场演唱会吸引了数百万人观看。
pinyin: Zhè chǎng yǎnchànghuì xīyǐn le shù bǎiwàn rén guānkàn.
english: The concert attracted several million viewers.

meaning: wing (of an air force); sports team representing a combination of enti
sentence: 空军联队的战机昨日举行例行训练。
pinyin: Kōng jūn lián duì de zhàn jī zuó rì jǔ xíng lì xíng xùn liàn.
english: The air force wing's fighter jets carried out routine training exercises yesterday.

meaning: vocational high school (abbr. to 職高|职高[zhi2 gao1])
sentence: 他选择读职业高中，毕业后直接进入汽车修理行业。
pinyin: Tā xuǎn zé dú zhí yè gāo zhōng, bì yè hòu zhí jiē jìn rù qì chē xiū lǐ háng yè.
english: He chose to attend a vocational high school and went straight into the auto repair industry after graduating.

meaning: standing image (of a Buddha or saint)
sentence: 广场上有一尊金色的立像。
pinyin: Guǎngchǎng shàng yǒu yī zūn jīnsè de lì xiàng.
english: There is a golden standing statue in the plaza.
